opinion.h: BROADY v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 104. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: Sol Gelb and Harris B. Steinberg for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE HARLAN took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
opinion.h: KISER v. CLINCHFIELD COAL CORP., 361 U.S. 8 (1959)
opinion.p: 361 U.S. 8 KISER ET AL. v. CLINCHFIELD COAL CORP. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF APPEALS OF VIRGINIA. No. 106. Decided October 12, 1959.
Appeal dismissed for want of a properly presented federal question. Reported below: 200 Va. 517, 106 S.E.2d 601.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a properly presented federal question.
